text: Founder-led firms outperform on five-year ROIC over the 2010-2020 cross-section.
reasoning: Cross-section of 200 founder-led vs. CEO-led firms; ROIC computed from public 10-K filings; difference significant at p<0.01.

text: Geometric coherence (Hoyer sparsity of premise-continuation difference vectors) is a discriminative signal for logical contradiction in modern sentence-encoder embeddings.
reasoning: Quintin Hypothesis v1 benchmark; AUROC ~0.586 on the firm's contradiction_geometry probe vs. 0.50 random.

text: Householder reflection ablation does not change accuracy on contradiction classification at the firm's frozen v1 thresholds.
reasoning: Ablation harness at replication/run.py ablation; identical accuracy across five reflection variants in deterministic mode.

text: Calibration interval gaming (clusters of ultra-narrow predictions around 0.5) inflates headline Brier scores without improving epistemic resolution.
reasoning: calibration_guard rule fires on ≥10 rows whose interval width is below a threshold; tested against synthetic gamed rows.

text: Source credibility, modelled as a Beta posterior over per-source verification outcomes, is sufficient to bound an objection's severity from above.
reasoning: Severity rubric multiplies the structural ceiling by source_credibility; tabloid-cited objections cannot land in the high bracket.

text: Strict Kantian deontology treats lying to a murderer at the door as morally impermissible.
reasoning: Direct application of the categorical imperative as Kant lays it out in Groundwork; the universalisability test fails for lying-as-policy.

text: A binding price ceiling below the market-clearing price produces a quantity shortage and welfare loss in a competitive market.
reasoning: Standard partial-equilibrium analysis; ceiling at P* < P_eq drives quantity supplied below quantity demanded.

text: A photon's energy is proportional to its frequency, with the constant of proportionality being Planck's constant h ≈ 6.626×10⁻³⁴ J·s.
reasoning: E = hν from quantum mechanics; verified against a wide range of photoelectric and atomic-spectra measurements.

text: An adversarial reviewer reading only the conclusion text (no methodology) can still surface high-severity objections at rates well above chance.
reasoning: Multi-provider swarm runs over a stub bench; high-severity objections appear without methodology context for several configurations.

text: Backdated effective_at on dialectic JSONL records cannot be set without a human attestation flag once the temporal_guard policy hook is in place.
reasoning: temporal_guard.dialectic_may_set_effective_at returns False when effective_at_human_attested is absent or false.
